name: Nubiks build a defense vs zombies
description: Nubiks build a defense vs zombies - a game with elements of construction and survival. Build defenses and survive against waves of zombies! Who will be eaten first? The game has a single player mode. But the whole game is focused on a two-person mode, and all the fun is there, so lets call friends and have fun!
instructions: PC management Blue is the arrow keys while the down arrow is the build Red WAD - movement S - build There is a double jump in the game On a mobile device control using on-screen buttons
tags: 1 Player, 2 Player, 2 Player Games, Ghost, mineblock, Minecraft, Mobile, Monster, Sandbox, Zombie
